prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on pyridine (11 atoms: N + 5C + 5H). Method: DFT, tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fitted RKS), PySCF backend. Gas phase. Charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied pyridine.xyz, not re-optimized at this level (single-point). SCF converged in 10 cycles. No warnings reported. HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.1398131 eV (headline value). Total electronic energy = −248.3782 Hartree. integrity.trustworthy = true. The gap is a Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy.
